description: CRMX is an all-in-one CRM and automation platform for small businesses that centralizes lead management, follow-ups, marketing, and reporting starting at $199 per month.
tagline: The number one automated follow-up platform
overview: CRMX helps small businesses in home services, coaching, gyms, and schools centralize and automate their sales and marketing operations. It uses AI to organize leads, run email and text marketing, handle appointment booking, and manage customer follow-ups from a single dashboard.
what_is: CRMX is an all-in-one CRM built for small businesses. It covers lead management, sales pipelines, marketing automation, and customer follow-ups within a single platform. Its built-in automation, customizable dashboards, and structured follow-up system reduce manual work and improve sales conversions. Pricing starts at $199 per month for up to 20 users.

The platform is designed for home services businesses, coaches, gyms, and schools that need to streamline sales and marketing without technical complexity. Most users report seeing results within two weeks, aided by a straightforward setup process and ready-to-use automation. Onboarding includes personalized coaching, data migration assistance, and free website hosting to smooth the transition. CRMX consolidates email marketing, text marketing, appointment booking, and reporting into one system.

It functions as a CRM and automation hub within a small business go-to-market stack. It is not designed for large enterprises or organizations with highly specialized industry requirements, and it works best for small businesses that want a practical, revenue-focused system they can operate without a dedicated IT team.
